rl_filter_simulation.note: In-sample post-hoc simulation — RL trained and tested on same 227 trades. Real out-of-sample improvement will be smaller.

note: Model v2: 4-dim state (rsi_bucket/ema/atr_bucket/regime), 6-bucket RSI, reward shaping. 19 states, 8 VETO. In-sample RL filter: win rate 40%→52%, R:R 1.79→2.35, blocks 68% of losing trades.
